prompt: Find all devices that have made network connections to any IP in the 185.220.0.0/16 range (known Tor exit node range) in the past 2 weeks.

assertions.text: Query uses ipv6_is_match for CIDR range comparison, not startswith or contains
assertions.evidence: Uses ipv4_is_in_range() — won't match IPv6-mapped ::ffff:185.220.x.x addresses

assertions.text: Query uses 14d or 2w time filter (not default 7d)
